prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion model. The current price of AON is $322.98. Historical data for AON over the past year was used to estimate the daily volatility (standard deviation of log returns) at approximately 1.13%. The average daily log return (drift) was estimated to be 0.0687%, reflecting its general upward trend. The point estimate is calculated by applying this drift to the current price. Confidence intervals are derived using the estimated daily volatility and standard Z-scores for the respective confidence levels, assuming log returns are normally distributed.
